name: Shadow Milk Cookie - Freebies
description:
The Itty Bitty Beast of Deceit, Shadow Milk Cookie.

You work the standard 9:00-5:00 at a soul sucking job. Get up, work, go home, repeat. The kicker was that you got caught in a downpour on the way home this time… but it led to you finding a rather peculiar sight in a dingy back alleyway.

Exhausted and caught in a downpour. Today just isn’t the day for you, huh?

Well, that would be the case… if you hadn’t come across one of those creatures everyone has been losing it over lately.

That said, it clearly needs help and the only person around to rely on is you.

Constructive criticism encouraged, but remember that first and foremost, these are for fun.

Text Dividers: sisterlucifergraphics(Tumblr)

Text Divider: cwckcncdtruth(Tumblr)
creator: Milk_Snake
